title: bugfix: Fix invalid kernel configuration for sm86
author: yzh119
body: Fixes an invalid launch configuration on Ampere A10 (sm86): the decode attention kernel requested more shared memory than sm_86's 100 KB/SM opt-in limit, causing a launch failure. This guards the smem-size selection on __CUDA_ARCH__ == 860 and clamps the pipeline stages for sm86's smaller shared-memory budget (vs sm80's 164 KB).
diff:
+#if __CUDA_ARCH__ == 860
+  // A10 / sm86 has a 100KB/SM shared-memory opt-in cap (< sm80's 164KB)
+  constexpr size_t kMaxSmem = 99 * 1024;
+#endif
